## Test plan

## DoD checklist (alpha gate where applicable)

- [ ] Visuals exceed `references/poc.html` baseline
- [ ] No fog
- [ ] No skeletal animations on characters
- [ ] No virtual joysticks
- [ ] No bare three.js mounts (R3F + drei only)
